ddls:
CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award category */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the award category */,
  "year_introduced" INTEGER /* Year the award category was first introduced */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the award category is currently active */,
  "category_type" TEXT /* Type of category (e.g., Performance, Songwriting, Production) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grammy_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Grammy year */,
  "grammy_year" INTEGER /* Year the Grammy Awards were presented */,
  "date_of_award_ceremony" TEXT /* Date of the Grammy Awards ceremony for that year */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the Grammy Awards ceremony was held */,
  "host" TEXT /* Name of the host for the Grammy Awards ceremony */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the music genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the music genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (for hierarchical genre structure) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the genre is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nominations" (
  "nomination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nomination */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award category */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Grammy year */,
  "song_name" TEXT /* Name of the nominated song */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist nominated */,
  "song_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the nominated song in seconds */,
  "song_producer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the producer of the nominated song */,
  "song_writer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the writer of the nominated song */,
  "is_performance" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the nominated song was performed at the ceremony */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nomination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nominations_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES grammy_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nominations_song_producer_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_producer_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nominations_song_writer_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_writer_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nominations_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nominations_award_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_id") REFERENCES awards ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography or description of the artist */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the artist */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the artist */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the artist is currently active */,
  "artist_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of artist (from `singer_types`) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award category performed */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Grammy year */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist performing */,
  "song_name" TEXT /* Name of the song performed */,
  "performance_order" INTEGER /* Order in which the performance took place */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the performance in seconds */,
  "is_live" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the performance was live or pre-recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES grammy_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_award_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_id") REFERENCES awards ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "winners" (
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each winner entry */,
  "nomination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nomination that won */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award category */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who won */,
  "date_of_win" TEXT /* Date the award was won */,
  "is_performance" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the winning song was performed at the ceremony */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("winner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_winners_award_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_id") REFERENCES awards ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_winners_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_winners_nomination_id FOREIGN KEY ("nomination_id") REFERENCES nominations ("nomination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "singer_types" (
  "singer_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performer type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Type of the performer (e.g., solo, duo, group) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the performer type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("singer_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "award_performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance associated with an award */,
  "nomination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nomination this performance is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_genres" (
  "artist_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist-genre association */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre the artist is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_genres_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_management" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for user login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, editor) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last user login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_management ("user_id")
)
